case_title: WAI, JOHN vs. ESPINOSA, JOSE et al

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WAI, JOHN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ESPINOSA, JOSE DICK, TRACY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: RESTORED TO PLAINTIFF ON 06/14/95 $2,275.79 RENT, $630.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $246.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,151.79, LEASE FORFEITED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WAI, JOHN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ESPINOSA, JOSE DICK, TRACY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 310 COLERIDGE, S.F. CA 94110, LEASE FORFEITED
